# Systematic SHA-256 Trace Verification

## Checking Message → W[0..15] (L0001–L0018)
Message is 50 bytes. With SHA-256 padding (0x80 + zeros + 64-bit length = 400 = 0x190):
- W[12] = `6A588000` (last 2 message bytes + 0x80 + 0x00) ✓ (L0015)
- W[13] = `00000000`, W[14] = `00000000` ✓ (L0016–L0017)
- W[15] = `00000190` (50×8 = 400 bits) ✓ (L0018)

## Checking Message Schedule W[16], W[17], W[19], W[32]
- **W[16]** = σ₁(W[14])+W[9]+σ₀(W[1])+W[0] = 0+`2173282F`+`203E0E04`+`2D6E7973` = `6F1FAFA6` ✓ (L0019)
